TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv_Dwiyaq, title = Dwiyaq, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Seediq]}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/wiki/Dwiyaq} }

S.FORM: = Dwiyaq = Dwiyaq nii ga kari Sediq Toda, "dgiyaq" msa ka kari Seejiq Truku mi Seediq Tgdaya.
S.PHON: = dwijaq = dwijaq nii ga kaɾi sədiq toda, "dgijaq" msa ka kaɾi səəɟiq tɾuku mi səədiq tgdaja.
S.FORM: = Dwiyaq = Dwiyaq nii ga kari Sediq Toda, "dgiyaq" msa ka kari Seejiq Truku mi Seediq Tgdaya.
S.PHON: = dwijaq = dwijaq nii ga kaɾi sədiq toda, "dgijaq" msa ka kaɾi səəɟiq tɾuku mi səədiq tgdaja.
